modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Missing Zoom chat recording in D2L platform

full_description_text: 
El chat de Zoom no se encuentra en D2L. Faltan partes de la grabación. Esto es un problema porque el técnico necesita la grabación completa para revisar.
short_description: Missing Zoom chat recording in D2L platform
description: El chat de Zoom no se encuentra en D2L. Faltan partes de la grabación. Esto es un problema porque el técnico necesita la grabación completa para revisar.
